scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,AUTH,USER,SOCIAL,CHAT,ACAD,NOTIF" -c "magenta,blue,green,yellow,cyan,white,red" "npm run dev --workspace=gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=services/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/user-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/social-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/chat-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/academic-service" "npm run dev --workspace=services/notification-service"
